summary: Iteration 8 - Visor Finance App Phase 1 Invest Screen Testing. Backend APIs fully pass (25/25 tests). Frontend Invest screen displays correctly with Indian Markets at TOP, Portfolio Overview with real user data (₹38K from SIP/PPF/Stocks breakdown), Asset Allocation pie chart, Risk Profile & Strategy, Tax Saving, and Financial Goals sections. One UI bug found: Silver (1Kg) price displays truncated as '1,05' instead of '1,04,500'.

ui_bugs.issue: Silver price displays '1,05' instead of '1,04,500'. The API returns correct price (104500) but UI truncates/clips the text. The fmtPrice function works correctly (verified via Node.js test), issue is in text rendering/layout.

issues: All sections render in correct order: Indian Markets > Portfolio Overview > Asset Allocation > Risk Profile > Tax Saving > Financial Goals

action_items: Fix Silver (1Kg) price display truncation - verify text container width or number formatting in market card wide layout
critical_code_review_comments: Market data uses seeded values (MOCKED initial data), Alpha Vantage API calls may not return data with demo key
The fmtPrice function at line 187 works correctly, issue is likely in marketPrice style or text container width for wide card
seed_data_creation: No new seed data created. Used existing demo user data.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend market-data API fully tested and working. Frontend Invest screen verified via Playwright - shows Indian Markets at top with 5 cards (Nifty 50, SENSEX, Nifty Bank, Gold 10g, Silver 1kg). Silver price has display bug showing '1,05' instead of '1,04,500'. Portfolio Overview shows ₹38.0K with SIP/PPF/Stocks breakdown. Pie chart works correctly. Risk Assessment modal opens with 3 questions. Goals CRUD works. Navigation to Invest tab via bottom nav works.

features_verified.GET /api/market-data: PASS - Returns 5 items with all required fields (key, name, price, change, change_percent, prev_close, icon, last_updated)
features_verified.POST /api/market-data/refresh: PASS - Requires auth (401 without), returns success message with auth
features_verified.GET /api/dashboard/stats: PASS - Returns invest_breakdown with correct sum matching total_investments
features_verified.Goals CRUD API: PASS - Create, Read, Update, Delete all work
features_verified.frontend_indian_markets_section: PASS - Shows at TOP of Invest screen
features_verified.frontend_portfolio_overview: PASS - Shows ₹38.0K total with SIP/PPF/Stocks breakdown
features_verified.frontend_asset_allocation_pie: PASS - Shows donut chart with 3 segments (52.6%, 26.3%, 21.1%)
features_verified.frontend_risk_profile: PASS - Shows 'Moderate' badge with 'Balanced Growth Strategy'
features_verified.frontend_retake_assessment: PASS - Opens modal with risk questions
features_verified.frontend_financial_goals: PASS - Section visible, Add button works
features_verified.frontend_section_order: PASS - Markets > Portfolio > Allocation > Risk > Tax > Goals

market_data_note: Market data is SEEDED with static initial values. Alpha Vantage API integration exists but uses demo key which may not return live data.
